steps.title: Define the claim
steps.content: The claim says Mrs. Sommers sometimes makes decisions without conscious deliberation. The best quotation must show her acting without thinking or being guided by impulse.

steps.title: Reject less direct quotations
steps.content: Choice A shows a purchase and reaction to a parcel. Choice B says present needs absorbed her attention, but not that she acted unconsciously. Choice D shows her selecting and examining stockings.

steps.title: Use the impulse quotation
steps.content: The remaining quotation explicitly says she “was not thinking at all” and was guided by a “mechanical impulse.” The answer is C.
